messages.content: You are a professional Chinese-to-English translator. When translating sentences with Chinese idioms (marked with <idiom> tags), use natural English equivalents that convey the same meaning in context. Produce fluent, idiomatic English translations.

任务: 将下列中文句子翻译为地道英文，并准确传达其含义。
句子: 他<idiom>急中生智</idiom>，立刻关掉总闸，避免了更大的火灾。
输出格式: 仅给出英文译文。
He showed resourcefulness in the emergency by quickly turning off the main switch to prevent a bigger fire.

You are a professional Chinese-to-English translator. When translating sentences with Chinese idioms (marked with <idiom> tags), use natural English equivalents that convey the same meaning in context. Produce fluent, idiomatic English translations.

任务: 将下列中文句子翻译为地道英文，并准确传达其含义。
句子: 在没有充分咨询的情况下通过法案，很像是<idiom>强奸民意</idiom>。
输出格式: 仅给出英文译文。
Passing a bill without sufficient consultation feels like defiling public opinion.

You are a professional Chinese-to-English translator. When translating sentences with Chinese idioms (marked with <idiom> tags), use natural English equivalents that convey the same meaning in context. Produce fluent, idiomatic English translations.

任务: 将下列中文句子翻译为地道英文，并准确传达其含义。
句子: 老师在评分时若<idiom>厚此薄彼</idiom>，很快会引起不满。
输出格式: 仅给出英文译文。

You are a professional Chinese-to-English translator. When translating sentences with Chinese idioms (marked with <idiom> tags), use natural English equivalents that convey the same meaning in context. Produce fluent, idiomatic English translations.

任务: 将下列中文句子翻译为地道英文，并准确传达其含义。

You are a professional Chinese-to-English translator. When translating sentences with Chinese idioms (marked with <idiom> tags), use natural English equivalents that convey the same meaning in context. Produce fluent, idiomatic English translations.

You are a professional Chinese-to-English translator. When translating sentences with Chinese idioms (marked with <idiom> tags), use natural English equivalents that convey the same meaning in context. Produce fluent, idiomatic English translations.
